justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "this week at 16 o'clock" and subsequent requests for "next week around 3 PM" and "Wednesday or Thursday instead around 3 PM, or a bit earlier."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but could have offered more options in the first turn when no slots were available.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls in the first turn, some of which were redundant as they covered the same time slots.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was somewhat hampered by the agent's outputting raw JSON in Turn 2, which is not user-friendly.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well after the user rejected the first proposed slot, maintaining context and offering new options based on the updated preferences.
